title: Device Home Screen - Internet is off - User Guide
scenario: User Guide shows "Something went wrong" screen when opened offline after connecting a new Bluetooth device
steps: Connect a new device in Bluetooth settings.
Tap on 3 dots -> Device Settings page is displayed.
Tap on User Guide -> 'Something went wrong' screen is displayed.
Tap on 'X' in upper right corner -> 'Something went wrong' screen is closed and Device Settings page is displayed.
expected: When internet is off, tapping User Guide shows a "Something went wrong" screen. Tapping the "X" closes that screen and returns to the Device Settings page.
